source_pr.title: ddl: fix data race in unit test TestChangeColumn
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? ``` ============= WARNING: DATA RACE Read at 0x000002df5a08 by goroutine 151: github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl.(*ddl).CreateTable() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl/ddl_api.go:619 +0x77f github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor.(*DDLExec).executeCreateTable() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor/ddl.go:157 +0xca github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor.(*DDLExec).Next() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor/ddl.go:88 +0x518 github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor.(*ExecStmt).handleNoDelayExecutor() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor/adapter.go:289 +0x1d5 github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor.(*ExecStmt).Exec() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor/adapter.go:242 +0x617 github.com/pingcap/tidb/session.runStmt() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/session/tidb.go:153 +0xd2 github.com/pingcap/tidb/session.(*session).executeStatement() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/session/session.go:840 +0x21d github.com/pingcap/tidb/session.(*session).executeStatement() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/session/session.go:838 +0x1a7 github.com/pingcap/tidb/session.(*session).execute() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/session/session.go:908 +0x9d8 github.com/pingcap/tidb/session.(*session).Execute() Previous write at 0x000002df5a08 by goroutine 89: [failed to restore the stack] ``` ### What is changed and how it works? Use atomic to avoid race ### Check List Tests - No code @zimulala @winkyao --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/8724)
